perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man wearing glasses and a checkered cap faces the camera, speaking with animated expressions. (2) He gestures with both hands as if holding an invisible controller. (3) A technical patent drawing (Fig. 5) is shown, illustrating a user with a VR headset and a controller interacting with a screen. (4) The man continues talking to the camera, with variety-show style text bubbles and graphics appearing around him. (5) On-screen graphics show emotional states like 'nervous' and 'relaxed' alongside emojis. (6) The man looks directly at the camera, pointing slightly with his index finger as he asks a concluding question.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A mature male voice speaks in Mandarin with an enthusiastic and professional tone. Background music is a rhythmic, medium-tempo electronic lo-fi track. (2) The narration remains continuous and clear, while the background music maintains a steady volume throughout the technical explanation. (3) No significant ambient noise is detected; the recording quality is crisp, suggesting a studio or quiet indoor environment.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '下一代 PS6 能讀心嗎？' - Decorative/Hook Text, Tone: Curious. (2) 'SONY 最新專利曝光' - Functional Text, Tone: Informative. (3) '搭載生物感應技術' - Functional Text, Tone: Explanatory. (4) '壓力跟情緒' - Functional Text, Tone: Neutral. (5) '自動調整遊戲難度' - Decorative/Hook Text, Tone: Exciting. (6) '很緊張?' and '很放鬆' - Decorative/Effect Text, Tone: Playful. (7) '超級的個人化體驗' - Decorative/Hook Text, Tone: Impressed. (8) '環境的冷熱變化' - Functional Text, Tone: Neutral. (9) '你期待嗎?' - Decorative/Hook Text, Tone: Engaging.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Host introduction -> Patent explanation with visual aids -> Feature breakdown -> Closing viewer engagement

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 male host present as the sole main character throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man wearing an ivy cap with a checkered pattern, round glasses, and a black t-shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A simple indoor studio background, slightly out of focus, featuring gray curtains or walls.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Evidence (Patent) -> Benefit Explanation -> Closing CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video informs the audience about a newly surfaced Sony patent for a PlayStation controller. It details how the controller might use bio-sensing technology to track player stress, heart rate, and temperature to dynamically adjust game difficulty and environmental effects, aiming to heighten immersion in future consoles like the PS6.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The content is structured as a technology news commentary and analysis by a well-known influencer, rather than a paid promotional advertisement for a specific product currently for sale.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Host's signature checkered cap and glasses; '3C有意思Tim哥' social media branding in the top corner.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video effectively uses technical diagrams to provide visual proof for the tech rumors, maintaining a high level of credibility for short-form social media content.
